forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 51. West southwest wind 3 to 7 mph.

forecast.name: Tuesday
forecast.detailedForecast: Sunny. High near 64, with temperatures falling to around 62 in the afternoon. West southwest wind 3 to 10 mph.

weather_report:
As the city of San Francisco settles into the cool embrace of the early morning, the air carries a quiet calm, offering a brief respite before the day unfolds. The sky is partly cloaked in clouds, a gentle prelude to the sun’s eventual ascent. With the forecast promising a cheerful sunny interlude, one can anticipate a gradual warmth that will give way to a high near 64 degrees. The winds whisper softly, barely breaching the tranquility at 3 to 7 mph, suggesting a day where the cool marine layer lingers just beyond the hills, likely kissing the Golden Gate with tendrils of mist.

As afternoon nears, temperatures will begin to taper off, hinting at the migratory patterns of fog that often grace our coastal shores. Dressing in layers would be wise: a light sweater for those morning chills, transitioning to lighter attire as the sun makes its presence known. This is a day for simple pleasures. Stroll through the fragrant gardens of the Presidio or enjoy a leisurely afternoon at a local café, perhaps indulging in a book, as the rhythm of life ebbs and flows around you. The weather invites a sense of ease, ideal for embracing the calm beauty that is uniquely San Francisco.
